queries.question: How many homeowners are there in numbers?
How many people own homes and what is this as a percentage of the total?
queries.sql: SELECT O.Percentage * O.TotalPopulation/ 100, N.NumberOfHouseholds  FROM OwnerPercentage AS O LEFT JOIN NumbersOfOwners AS N on O.Year = N.Year

queries.question: What was the owner percentage of homes in 2023?
queries.sql: SELECT O.Percentage * O.TotalPopulation  / 100 FROM OwnerPercentage AS O WHERE O.Year = 2023

queries.question: What was the number of owners of homes in 2023?
queries.sql: SELECT O.NumberOfHouseholds FROM NumbersOfOwners AS O WHERE O.Year = 2023
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?numberofhouseholds WHERE {
  ?o a :NumbersOfOwners .
  ?o p:NumberOfHouseholds ?numberofhouseholds .
  ?o p:Year ?year_f .
  FILTER(?year_f = 2023)
}

queries.question: What percentage of people own homes?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?numberofhouseholds WHERE {
  ?numbersofowners a :NumbersOfOwners .
  ?numbersofowners p:NumberOfHouseholds ?numberofhouseholds .
}

queries.question: How many people owned homes in 2023?
queries.sql: SELECT O.Percentage * O.TotalPopulation / 100, N.NumberOfHouseholds  FROM OwnerPercentage AS O LEFT JOIN NumbersOfOwners AS N on O.Year = N.Year WHERE O.Year = 2023

ambiguous_dsl.question: How many people own homes?
How many people owned homes in 2023?
